name: Pizza Topped Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the ground chuck, milk, saltine cracker crumbs, onion, eggs, garlic powder, basil, and oregano until well combined.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
3. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
4. Once done, remove any excess grease from the top of the meatloaf using a paper towel.
5. Arrange a can of pizza sauce (10-1/2 ounce), mushrooms, mozzarella cheese, and parmesan cheese on top of the meatloaf.
6. Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes or until the cheese is melted and heated through.
